ModuleName: Advanced Tree Structures: AVL Trees, Heaps, and Tries

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the module's topics progressing from BST fundamentals and imbalance problems through AVL tree properties, balance factors, and performance analysis, serving as a navigational overview for learners and instructors to understand the scope and sequence of the module.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: This page outlines the topics covered in the module — including BST limitations, AVL tree rotations and balancing, heaps, and tries — giving learners and instructors an overview of what will be studied and in what order.
